title: End update
description: The mod adds more significance to the End! He will add a new resource to improve the Netherite equipment
body:
When installing this mod, **Dunerite** will appear at the end. Thanks to **Dunerite**, you can upgrade Netherite equipment! To upgrade Netherite armor, you'll need to find the **Fower**. Legends say that "**Fowler** is the link between the Nether and the Overworld." At the end of the game, a room from the temple of the God of Emptiness will appear. In this room, you can find a template for upgrading Netherite gear.

I apologize for the fact that there have been no updates for so long, I have already forgotten about this mod... I deleted all the mod files, but I promise there will be updates!
